creator: woodsb02@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 153303
Patch to update multimedia/mediabrowser to 3.0.5518.7

Previous patch forgot to include updated pkg-plist file. This patch now includes this.
This has been tested and works on FreeBSD 10.1 amd64 with poudriere testport:
http://woodsb02.no-ip.org/poudriere/build.html?mastername=101amd64-default&build=2015-02-22_10h08m41s
